title: Monster Energy
description: Monster Energy Drink Original Texture Pack 1.9 - 1.21+
body:
# 🟢 Monster Energy 32x PVP Texture Pack (Monster Edition)

**Monster Energy 32x** is a **high-quality optimized PVP texture pack**, inspired by *Monster Energy (original green)*, designed for competitive Minecraft players on **versions 1.9 - 1.21+**.  
Created by **iTzDrakthar** ⚡  

---

## 📦 Features  

- ✨ **Custom Particles** – unique effects for better visibility in fights  
- 🗡️ **Custom Weapon Textures** – redesigned swords & tools for PVP  
- 🧱 **Custom Blocks** – clear & optimized blocks for duels and UHC  
- 🐾 **Custom Entity Models** – mobs and entities with Monster-inspired style  
- 🍏 **Custom Items** – golden apples, crystals, totems and more with a green Monster theme  
- 🎞️ **Custom Animations** – smooth and improved animations  
- 🌌 **Custom Sky** – unique day & night sky for an immersive PVP experience  

---

## 🔧 Technical Info  

- 🎮 **Game Version:** 1.9 – 1.21+  
- 🖼️ **Resolution:** 32x (lightweight & optimized)  
- ⚡ **Optimized:** FPS BOOST ✔️  

---
